label: Screen context • Safari article body beats nav chrome
notes: A reading scene with no focused input: the large article body (a big static-text block) is the real on-screen signal and must lead the sample ahead of small sidebar chrome (Reading List / Downloads), while bare browser/build version tokens are dropped.

rubric: Indicates the user is reading an article about macOS accessibility
Does not surface the browser/build version numbers as on-screen content
